inspector.summary: Aerial survey of Manipal University Bengaluru campus detected 33 defects across 6 zones. 6 critical findings require immediate action: DEF-002, DEF-006, DEF-020. Priority areas: library facade integrity, hostel structural settlement, and monsoon water ingress mitigation.

classified_defects.recommendation: Commission concrete repair contractor. Remove loose material and apply protective coating.
Inspect roof membrane and flashings. Schedule waterproofing repair before next rainfall.
Schedule structural engineer assessment within 72 hours. Install crack monitors for ongoing measurement.
Remove biological growth and apply biocide treatment. Improve drainage to reduce moisture.
Inspect roof membrane and flashings. Schedule waterproofing repair before next rainfall.
Commission concrete repair contractor. Remove loose material and apply protective coating.
Remove biological growth and apply biocide treatment. Improve drainage to reduce moisture.
Inspect roof membrane and flashings. Schedule waterproofing repair before next rainfall.
Schedule window replacement during next maintenance cycle. Apply temporary weatherproofing.
Inspect roof membrane and flashings. Schedule waterproofing repair before next rainfall.
Schedule window replacement during next maintenance cycle. Apply temporary weatherproofing.
Schedule structural engineer assessment within 72 hours. Install crack monitors for ongoing measurement.

immediate_actions: Cordon off areas below spalling zones — falling debris risk
Install temporary shoring at settlement-affected structures
Deploy moisture barriers at active water ingress points
Schedule emergency structural review for critical-rated buildings
monitoring_recommendations: Install IoT crack-width sensors on critical facades
Deploy tilt sensors on structures showing settlement
Schedule monthly drone re-surveys for change detection

violations.description: Structural integrity compromised — visible settlement and facade cracking exceed allowable limits
Roof drainage and waterproofing failures — active water ingress detected
Concrete cover insufficient — corrosion staining indicates rebar exposure risk
Facade elements at risk of detachment — spalling concrete overhead
Fenestration seal failures — compromised thermal envelope integrity

compliant_elements: Foundation bearing capacity (no major settlement beyond spec)
Fire egress pathways — clear and accessible
Electrical infrastructure — no exposed hazards detected
